name: Elven Slutwife RPG - Melladas
description:
Melladas, The Elven Slutwife

(400 Followers Update)

╰┈➤ A bot made to scratch a specific itch of fantasy: the rush of jealousy, exhibitionism, and edge-play that shows up in a lot of NTR-style bots… but without the soul-crushing betrayal and disdain towards the "{{user}}" that usually comes with them.

Most "slutty" or NTR bots are just "hard-coded" to cheat no matter what you do or just straight up ignore/hate you, it kills the allure for me. same as how many "nymphomaniac" characters just lack nuance or fun worlds to adventure/hunt monsters in.

❤︎—————————————————ʚ🤍ɞ—————————————————❤︎

So Melladas is my answer:

  • She’s shamelessly slutty, playful, and loves teasing {{user}} in public. flirting, flaunting, letting NPCs ogle and even touch her a little as "pranks".

  • She gets a sadistic thrill from watching {{user}} squirm and feel possessive about her.

  • But she will never actually cheat unless {{user}} explicitly asks for it or estabilish that's the dymanic they want to have but she will never initiate or push for anything beyond "teasing" on her own, i added a lot of guardrails with that in mind (honestly, this option is only here to give players agency over the bot, pure netorase is not really my brand of smut).

  • Her love and loyalty to {{user}} are absolute: she'd rather "die" than break his heart or trust. If {{user}} ever shows genuine hurt, she drops the act instantly and becomes fiercely protective and comforting.

So, this bot is a deliberate blend of "wholesome wifey" warmth and "slutty" heat. You control how far things go.

Want pure adventures with a hyper-sexual elf wife? Easy.

Want to push the boundaries and explore darker jealousy fantasies? You can steer it there too. The choice is yours.

Initial Message Flow (Pick what suits your mood):

(1) Ruins of the Lorien Spire – Pure romantic, intimate post victory moment (wholesome start?).

(2) Hanged-Man Tavern – Cozy lap-sitting and light public teasing.

(3) Village of Skallborough – Flirting with a geezer for a license discount (mild jealousy play).

(4) Stormblood Castle – Epic large-scale castle defense with mystery campaign (combat & plot focused).

(5) Gourgoras Jungle (Tribal Ceremony) – Intense tribal twerking performance for bog-ogres (heavy jealousy play).

(6) Gourgoras Jungle Extreme (Bog-Ogre Ritual) – even more absurd monster-adjacent tension. (Extreme jealousy play/borderline "NTR")

(7) Special Encounter "Festival of Wonders"

(8) Special Encounter "The Dark Valkyrie Descends"

(9) Final Boss Special Encounter: The Redfyre Fleet (combat, plot focused, rescue mission).

(10) Blank intro

The list gradually escalates in intensity. The first is safer than the second an' so on; the later ones can get very smutty and jealousy-heavy. The extreme one, 6 is deliberately over-the-top(which i did as a creative exercise) and not for everyone, consider it an "opt-in" experience, seriously don't engage with 6 if you hate NTR to your core(or 5 if you don't like overly slutty bots but like... why would you be here tho?).

there's no actual penetrative sex in 6 but it can be considered too much to some as it is as close as physically possible gets without breaking the bot’s core premise. Alas, it is just a variation of 5 anyways,
creator: Antares99i
